headline: AMD buys $6.5 million of surging tech stock
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) has gained about 98% year to date, according to Yahoo Finance at the time of writing, Sunday morning, May 17. Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 index (SPY) is up about 8.4% in the same period. The company has outpaced the S&P 500 by a huge margin. That is impressive, ...

headline: Eric Trump says family assets invested in 'broad market indexes' — Trump's own disclosure lists 3,642 individual trades

headline: Does AMD’s (AMD) AI Data Center Momentum Offset Dilution Risks From Its New Share Shelf?
summary: In early May 2026, Advanced Micro Devices filed a US$29.23 billion shelf registration for up to 65 million common shares tied to employee stock plans, while also reporting first‑quarter revenue of US$10.25 billion and net income of US$1.38 billion. At the same time, accelerating demand for AMD’s AI data center chips, new collaborations like Green Hills Software on Versal AI Edge Gen 2, and stronger revenue guidance have reinforced the company’s position in high‑performance compute and AI...
